title: Suki Baby Supersoft Plush Small Baby's Bear with Embroidered Details (Beige)
features: Suki Baby - 'Simply Baby' small Beige babys Teddy Bear
Supersoft plush toy with embroidered details
Charming and simple character Bear ideal as a soother/comforter for boys or girls
description: Product Description Charming and simple supersoft plush small Babys Teddy Bear from Suki Gifts Baby collection. Quality Beige supersoft plush cuddly bear toy with embroidered nose, eyes and big happy smile. Ideal as a babys soother/comforter or first toy. Approximately 5.9 inches (15cm) in length. Suitable for Newborns upwards. Hand wash and air dry. Please remove all tags before giving this to a child. Suki Gifts are an innovative British company, providing high quality gifts and soft toys including Baby, Teddy Bears, Plush toys, Mugs, Piggy Banks and much more. Box Contains 1 x Suki Baby - 'Simply Baby' small Beige babys bear
